title: Ambulance
description: A mod that will allow you to heal in different ways!
body:
# General

It can be difficult to restore health in battle. The Ambulance mod brings new items to the game to restore health. The mod will be useful not only in survival, but also in mini-games and maps.

## Items

All the items in mod can be divided into groups:

- **Medicines** will have the effect that they were designed to produce.
- **Bandages** will take time to use and restore some health, but they are cheap.
- **Candies** are used instantly, but they have an extremely short-lasting effect.
- **Pills** do not immediately restore health. After 30 seconds, they will remove all effects from the player and apply regeneration. But a **strong pill** will only remove the negative effects.
- **Bars** will restore you a lot of hunger, but you won't be able to eat them twice in a row.
- **Injections** will heal not only you, but also your allies, if you hit them with a syringe.
- The **patch** instantly restores some health.
- A first-aid kit and a medic's kit will restore a lot of health. The **first-aid kit** can be used three times.
- **Vitamin complexes** will apply all the effects of plants at once.

## Plants

The mod also adds 5 new plants that can be used to make medicines. When plants are added, they will endow medicines with a unique effect:

- The **plantain** will have a regeneration effect.
- **Aloe** will restore your health when its level is less than a quarter. The **strong effect of aloe** will restore health when its level is less than half.
- **Mint** will protect you from nausea, poisoning and wither. The **strong effect of mint** will protect against almost all negative effects.
- **Rhodiola rosea** will apply accelerating effects. The strong version is **adrenaline**, which will give you bonuses depending on your health. The lower his level, the stronger the bonuses.
- **Lavender** will heal you when you sneak. A strong effect will restore your health when you are not running, and when you are sneaking, the treatment will be stronger.

## Modpacks

You can use this mod anywhere, but don't present it as your work.

## Discord

I have a Russian-language Discord server. However, even if you don't speak Russian, you can ask any question there in English, and I will answer you without any problems.
